interfaces.name: getHomeOverview
interfaces.description: Get data for the homepage, including core service categories and key CTAs.

interfaces.name: getServiceCategoriesForOverview
interfaces.description: Get all active service categories for the Services Overview page and main navigation.

interfaces.name: submitGeneralQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a general quote enquiry from the Services Overview or Home page when the user is unsure of the specific service.

interfaces.name: getPilingServiceFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and search options for the Piling Services listing page.

interfaces.name: listPilingServices
interfaces.description: List piling services with optional filters and keyword search for the Piling Services page.

interfaces.name: getServiceDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific service for the Service Detail page.

interfaces.name: submitServiceQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a tailored quote request for a specific service from the Service Detail page.

interfaces.name: getEarthworksServiceFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filters for the Earthworks Services listing page.

interfaces.name: listEarthworksServices
interfaces.description: List earthworks services with optional filters for the Earthworks Services page.

interfaces.name: previewEarthworksPackageConfiguration
interfaces.description: Calculate totals and validate an earthworks package configuration without submitting a quote.

parameters.name: hours_limit
parameters.description: Maximum allowed total machine hours, e.g., 40

interfaces.name: submitEarthworksPackageQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a quote request for a configured earthworks package, creating the package configuration and linked quote.

interfaces.name: calculatePileEstimate
interfaces.description: Calculate an estimated pile quantity and total cost for the Pile Estimator tool.

parameters.name: budget_threshold
parameters.description: Optional budget threshold to compare against, e.g., 60000

interfaces.name: submitPileEstimatorQuoteRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a detailed quote request based on a pile estimate calculation.

interfaces.name: getEquipmentFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Equipment Hire listing page.

interfaces.name: listEquipment
interfaces.description: List hire equipment with filters and sorting for the Equipment Hire listing page.

interfaces.name: getEquipmentDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific piece of equipment for the Equipment Detail page.

interfaces.name: addEquipmentToHireBooking
interfaces.description: Add a piece of equipment to the current hire booking, creating the booking if needed.

interfaces.name: getHireBookingSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current hire booking summary for the Hire Booking Summary page.

interfaces.name: updateHireBookingItemDuration
interfaces.description: Update the hire duration for an item in the current booking and recalculate totals.

interfaces.name: submitHireBooking
interfaces.description: Submit the current hire booking with contact details for processing.

interfaces.name: getProjectFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filters for the Projects & Case Studies page.

interfaces.name: listProjects
interfaces.description: List projects and case studies with filters for the Projects page.

interfaces.name: addProjectToShortlist
interfaces.description: Add a project to the user's shortlist for comparison.

interfaces.name: getProjectShortlistDetails
interfaces.description: Get the current shortlist and associated project details for the Shortlist / Comparison page.

interfaces.name: removeProjectFromShortlist
interfaces.description: Remove a project from the current shortlist.

interfaces.name: getAboutUsContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the About Us page.

interfaces.name: listCertifications
interfaces.description: List safety, quality, and environmental certifications for the Safety & Quality / Certifications page.

interfaces.name: getSafetyAndQualityOverview
interfaces.description: Get narrative content about safety management and quality assurance practices.

interfaces.name: searchResources
interfaces.description: Search and list FAQ and resource articles for the Resources & FAQ Listing page.

interfaces.name: getResourceArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full content for a resource article or FAQ detail page.

interfaces.name: submitContactEnquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a general or safety compliance enquiry via the Contact page.

parameters.name: related_certification_code
parameters.description: e.g., 'ISO 45001' when referencing a specific certification

interfaces.name: submitCallbackRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a callback request via the Contact page.

parameters.name: preferred_contact_date
parameters.description: Date string if a specific date is selected

interfaces.name: getNearestBranches
interfaces.description: Get branches ordered by proximity to a given site postcode for the Site Inspection Booking page.

interfaces.name: getSiteInspectionServiceTypes
interfaces.description: Get selectable site inspection service types for the booking form.

interfaces.name: getAvailableInspectionTimeSlots
interfaces.description: Get available inspection time slots for a specific branch, service type, and date.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date string for the requested day

interfaces.name: createSiteInspectionBooking
interfaces.description: Create a site inspection booking request.

parameters.name: inspection_datetime
parameters.description: Date or datetime string representing the inspection date

parameters.name: time_slot
parameters.description: Label of the chosen time slot, e.g., '10:00 AM'

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateHireBooking
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the current hire booking in internal state.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateProjectShortlist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the current project shortlist in internal state.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateBranchDistances
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate distances from a postcode to branches for nearest-branch determination.

helperFunctions.name: _persistPileEstimate
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to store a pile estimate and return its ID for later quote requests.

helperFunctions.name: _buildEarthworksPackageConfiguration
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute totals and assemble an EarthworksPackageConfiguration record from line items.
